reviews.title: Works well, light, easy.
reviews.text: This works really well, I do wish it had a little bit more weight to it.  I use the surface mouse generally and love it.  I bought this as a replacement bc I transitioned my surface mouse to my work computer. This works similarly well, it’s just so light it doesn’t feel as sturdy.  It won’t work with 2 devices at once, you have to keep switching, but does have multiple ways to connect.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling
reviews.text: I had hoped, for this price, I might get something that worked...NOT!  The edges are sharp and very uncomfortable.  If you have tiny hands, this might work.  Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

reviews.title: Awesome Bluetooth function and great price!
reviews.text: After ordering two other “blue tooth” mice and having to return them both when they were dependent on a USB port, this one came through with flying colors and was cheaper than the first two I had to buy and return!!

title: Neises LED Bluetooth Mouse,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Pro/MacBook Air/iMac/mac/ipad/ipad pro,Wireless Mouse for Macboook Air/MacBook Pro/PC (Silver)
description:
✅Packing list: Instructions*1, LED rechargeable Bluetooth5.1 + 2.4G dual-mode mouse *1, 2.4g Nano USB receiver *1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line *1, USB C-type adapter *1
✅How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:
Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse.
✅ How to connect to iOS/iPad/Pro/Air/ Mini/ Phone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse
first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.)
(1) open tabletSettings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）
(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)
🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse?
🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
✅ How to use the 2.4G receiver mode:
Open the 2.4G receiver mode at the bottom of the mouse, remove the USB receiver at the bottom of the mouse,Plug the USB receiver into your computer's USB port and move the mouse to start working，If your laptop is a Type C port, first plug the Type C adapter into your laptop's Type C port, then plug the mouse's USB receiver into the Type C adapter, and then move the mouse to work
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
features: ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

Use the DPI mouse button on the screen: you are free to adjust the mouse sensitivity to match your activity. Provide 3 DPI levels (800-1200-1600). The higher the DPI, the faster the cursor moves on the screen
For all computers and laptops and ios13 / ios14 tablet/pro/Air / Phone / MAC / MacBook / Pro / air windows / chromebook / HP / Dell
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.

title: COCNI Slim Silent Wireless Mouse, Portable 2.4GHz Wireless Computer Mouse with 3 Adjustable DPI and USB Receiver, Optical Office Wireless Mouse for Laptop, Desktop, MacBook, Chromebook, PC
features: 【Stable 2.4GHz Wireless Connection, Plug & Play】2.4GHz wireless technology provides stronger anti-interference capability, faster transmission speed and more reliable connection. Therefore, you do not need to worry about the interference of other devices around the COCNI wireless mouse. When you want to use the wireless mouse, just plug the USB receiver into your laptop. It does not require any drivers to be installed.

【Suitable for Various Object Surfaces】The wireless mouse has three adjustable DPIs (800, 1200, 1600). You can change the sensitivity of the cursor according to your needs, so that you can track accurately, smoothly and accurately on various object surfaces. Even without a mouse pad, this wireless mouse will not affect daily use. It allows you to use your laptop to work easily in an emergency or when you have not prepared the mouse pad in advance.

【Energy Saving and Longer Service Life】This COCNI wireless mouse is powered by two AAA batteries (not included in the package), which can maintain a battery life of more than 12 months. The intelligent sleep mode of the laptop wireless mouse can better extend the service life of the battery, and save time and money by reducing battery replacement. It will automatically enter the sleep mode after 6 minutes, without any operation, just click any button to activate the wireless mouse.

【Silent Click, Comfortable Feel】The design of the mute button can reduce the noise by 90%, which makes it an ideal wireless mouse for offices, conference rooms, cafes, libraries and bedrooms, helping you concentrate on your work and study without disturbing others except you. The slim shape, anti sweat, anti fingerprint and skin friendly surface of the wireless mouse provide maximum comfort and support. Robust rollers ensure that your hands do not slip when rolling. This wireless mouse has been designed by thousands of people. It is ergonomic and allows you to use the mouse at a high frequency without causing your fingers to feel sore.

【Strong Compatibility, Slim Portable Size】This COCNI wireless mouse is used in various computer devices (Macbook, Laptop, Desktop etc.) and various computer operating systems (MacOS, Win xp/7/8/10, Linux etc.). The ultra-thin design allows the cordless mouse to be carried anywhere at any time, because it can be easily placed in a laptop box or bag. Light and compact, it is very suitable for business trip or travel.

【High Quality Customer Service】We provide 24-hour customer service. For any questions about this wireless mouse, please feel free to contact us through your order page. If you are not satisfied with our wireless mouse, we will give you a full refund.Our service tenet is to "let customers buy at ease, use at ease, and have no worries after sales." Please do not hesitate to choose us!

description: 7 Colorful LED breathing light change alternately, soothing light lights up the mouse in dark, adds more fun to the life. Note: It can't be set to one specific color. How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.

title: Bluetooth Mouse for iPad MacBook Air Pro Mini Mac iPhone Tablet Cell Phone, Computer Wireless Mouse for Laptop PC Desktop, Dual Mode (Bluetooth + 2.4G), Portable Optical Cordless Mice Silent (Silver)
description:
Specifications:
Bluetooth Edition: Bluetooth 5.0 Mouse Dimensions: 4.21 X 2.36 X 1.26 inchs Mouse Weight: 2.05 ounces Operating Range: Up to 33 ft/ 10 meters Buttons Number: 3 Keys DPI Level: 1600 DPI Battery Powered: 1 AA battery powered,
Battery NOT Included
The mouse supports Bluetooth and 2.4GHz USB connection
Note: The Bluetooth Mouse only compatible with iPad OS/iOS 13 and above. So you need to update the system of your ipad and iphone to iPad OS/iOS 13 and above, and turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch, then connect the mouse.
How to connect Bluetooth mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to Bluetooth. 2: Then Turn on the Bluetooth switch of your tablet or mobile phone, and search for Bluetooth mouse. 3: Click the Bluetooth mouse on tablet phone or other devices to connect to your device.
How to connect 2.4GHz USB mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to 2.4G. 2: Then insert the USB receiver into the USB port of the notebook or computer, and then you can use it.
Package Included:
1x Dual Mode Mouse (Bluetooth+2.4GHz) 1x USB Receiver 1x User Manual
Broad Compatibility:
Compatible with iPadOS iPad 10.2/9.7 5th 6th 7th 8th 9th gen, iPad Air 10.5/10.9, iPad Pro 11/12.9 2nd 3rd 4th 5th generation, iPad Mini 5/4/3, iPhone 12 11 pro max, iPhone X XS XR max, etc.
Q&A
Where is the USB receiver?
The USB receiver is in the mouse, you can find it when you open the mouse's battery cover. When you don't use it, you can plug the nano receiver into the USB storage slot again, so you don't lose the USB.
Connectivity and USB troubleshooting
Restart your computer and make sure the mouse is turned on and not too far away from the USB Receiver.
Warranty: 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.
Bluetooth mouse only compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above.
features: Wide Compatibility: The mouse compatible with Windows XP/ Vista/ 7/ 8/ 10/ 11, Chrome OS, Mac OS, Android, iOS, and perfect for laptop notebook PC computer desktop chromebook, Apple iPhone iPad, iPad Air, iPad Mini, iPad Pro, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, Mac iMac Samsung Galaxy Tab/ Note/ S tablet smartphone Surface Pro and other multi device.【Bluetooth mouse compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above, turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch】

Dual-Mode Mouse (2.4G + Bluetooth 5.0): 2.4GHz wireless mode, plug and play, no need to download drivers. Bluetooth mode, easy to connect and pair. Both modes provide a reliable and stable connection up to 33 feet with virtually no drop-outs and delays. The wireless mouse realizes free switches between two devices with one mouse only by one click. Note: You can't use Bluetooth and 2.4G mode at the same time. The USB dongle is stored in the compartment next to the mouse battery slot.

Comfortable & Quiet Click: The wireless mouse features a hand-friendly contoured shape for all-day comfort. Quiet clicks allow you to focus on your work without worrying about disturbing others or causing unwanted distracting noises. 1600 DPI cursor sensitivity provides smooth, precise tracking and scrolling for easy navigation on most surfaces. The sturdy rubber scroll wheel prevents your hands from slipping when rolling. The nano receiver is stored on the back of the mouse.

Long Battery Life: The mouse is powered by 1 AA battery (battery is not included). The mouse will enter into auto-sleep mode after 10 minutes of inactivity, and you can click any key to wake it up. Long battery life and working time, it can be used for months without battery replacement. There is an ON/ OFF button on the back of the mouse, which can be turned off to save power. Battery NOT included.

Protable & Durable Design: The ergonomic design and smooth surface fit your hands perfectly and provide you with a comfortable experience. You can take it anywhere you need it for office, home, meetings or travel. Tested over 3 million clicks to ensure mouse durability. What You Will Get: Wireless Bluetooth Mouse, USB Receiver, User Manual, 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.

reviews.title: I couldn't have asked for a better productivity tool

This item has been with me for such a short time that I am still breaking it in. So far these are my notes.

This mouse takes advantage of both Bluetooth and 2.4G technology

The connection tends to become unstable after a few months, reconnect to solve the issue

If you are unfortunate enough to have more than one device with need for a mouse, switching between them will be time consuming and confusing due to the syncing required.

Its slim profile also makes it easy to store when not in use.

The battery life lasts for weeks

The power conserving switch saves battery life

Totally worth the price!

I hope this is helpful.

reviews.title: cheap mouse that gets the job done
reviews.text: This is a cheap mouse that gets the job done. There's no on and off button, so do know it's going to drain the battery no matter you use it or not as long as there's a battery in it. I consider myself having a pretty big hand for a woman (around 12in from thumb to my pinky when stretched), I still feel this mouse is a tad big for me that it wasn't intuitive when grabbing onto it. I also didn't like the edges/ dents for your thumb and ring finger. I now know a slimmer mouse without edges works better for me and I can't recommend this mouse unless you are looking for something less than ten.

reviews.title: Flawless Bluetooth connectivity with Mac
reviews.text: My Logitech M310 (been using them for 10-15 years) could not connect properly with my USB-C/Thunderbolt MacBookPro, using their USB dongle, thru a USB adapter. Scroll wheel would NOT work, and Logitech tech support said they would not update drivers. 'Don't use an adapter.' But they aren't aware that new Macs don't have old-school USB ports? Anyone else have this problem?! Anyway... this Seenda connects directly with Bluetooth, and connects instantly. If it sleeps (after a few hours?) it wakes and re-connects with one click, in less than a second. I charged the battery when I bought it a few weeks ago, and forgot that I might need to charge it again one day. Still going. Downsides: it is much smaller and lighter than I am used to (the M310 is easily twice as thick/tall) so I am getting used to that. Took awhile to find the right DPI/resolution/speed (and the button to change that is in a precarious, easy-to-hit-by-mistake position. Overall a great recommend.

reviews.title: squeaks when scrolling - not for small hands
reviews.text: Loud clicks, SQUEAKS when scrolling, made for larger hands. You would think since it's pink it wouldn't be designed for a mans hands but here we are. Ultimately, the obnoxious squeaking while scrolling is why I am returning it.

Product Description
World’s Most Advanced Tracking — Go More Places Than Optical or Laser. The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets — even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.

Comfort and durability
Modern design and premium finish provides comfort for either hand. Symmetrical shape and unique rubber grips give you control and cushioning.
Snap in and Go
Simply snap in the transceiver for convenient on-the-go storage.

8-Month Battery Life
Use your mouse without power interruption for up to 8 months. The snap-in transceiver automatically turns the mouse on and off, and the led battery status indicator lets you know when replacement is needed.
What is BlueTrack?
BlueTrack Technology works on more surfaces than both optical and laser mice. It uses high-angle imaging optics to generate an accurate picture of the surface.

reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.
reviews.text: I got this for my daughters birthday - she loved the design.  It synced right up and worked immediately.  It worked great with her computer - she really liked he feel of the mouse.  It is easy to pack away and travel with as well.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

RECHARGABLE BATTERY - Up to 70 days of power on a single charge, and one minute of charging gives you up to one hour of use; Battery: rechargeable Li-Po (500 mAh) battery.

reviews.title: not to big
reviews.text: easy to hook up to Mac air and works great

reviews.title: Compact
reviews.text: This was smaller than I expected, but works well for traveling. Easy to throw into a backpack or briefcase. Good battery life, really like the Bluetooth connection option

reviews.title: Bluetooth connection constantly lost between this mouse and Windows 10 laptop
reviews.text:
This item will not stay connected to a Windows machine through Bluetooth it does work beautifully with Mac
Tried many methods to try and fix connection problem figure it's probably a Microsoft glitch as usual

reviews.title: The best mouse ever!
reviews.text: I always buy Logitech mice but this is by far the best I have ever owned. It is rechargeable and it never loses the Bluetooth connection. The rechargeable battery lasts a very long time.

reviews.title: Best mouse ever.
reviews.text: This is my fourth one. I have lost one, given one away as a gift, and have a backup. I used it for detailed 3D modeling and it is precise, compact, and comfortable to use. I have never seen a better one.

title: Cute Hamster Mouse,Wireless Mouse 2.4 Ghz 1200 DPI Less Noise Cartoon Animal Shape Portable Optical Mice with USB Receiver for Notebook Windows Computer PC Laptop Gift Kids(Gray)
features: [Note:The USB receiver is on the bottom of the mouse, next to the battery slot.]Plug & Play, just plug the USB receiver into your PC.Battery Powered, just only need 1x AA battery(Not include)
Cartoon Animal Shape Design:Creative hamster shape, add fun to the typing process, The lightweight and simple features make the mouse perfect for the journey, office, home
2.4GHz Wireless Mouse: Ensures reliable connection with an increased working distance of up to 33' (15m) and eliminates delays, dropouts and interference.
Slim & Portable Design: convenient, only 60g weight, about 10.5 x 7.30x 4.0 cm. Perfect for travelling carry and it can be easily put in to your laptop bag and ultra-space saving.
Support most computer to control the system.System requirement: for Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10.

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

title: ESR Portable External Hard Drive Carrying Case, Pouch Holder for Computer Accessories, Sleeve Storage Organizer for Battery Pack, Wireless Mouse, Cables, and Earphones - Black
features: Keep Your Mouse on Hand: attach to your iPad, MacBook, or case so you’ll never forget your Magic Mouse again
Reusable Residue-Free Adhesive: powerful and secure adhesive lets you remove and re-attach until you find the perfect spot, without leaving annoying sticky residue behind
Compact and Secure: elastic lycra sleeve keeps your mouse secure, won’t add any bulk to your device, and makes retrieving or storing your mouse quick and easy
Compatibility: designed to perfectly fit the Apple Magic Mouse 1 and 2; also compatible with other, similarly-sized wireless mice

Notes: this product is designed for hard and smooth surfaces, and may not adhere properly to soft, matte, mesh, or glass surfaces; frequently removing and re-attaching the holder will weaken the adhesive

reviews.title: Good solution
reviews.text: Was worried about heat since the external drive I keep in this is used for gaming, but it works well.  Gave me an option to get the hdd off the desk.

reviews.title: Just what we needed
reviews.text: Love this idea! Bought 2….very happy with this purchase.

reviews.title: Stretches out of shape easily.
reviews.text: Serves the purpose. Neoprene is very thin. Stretches out of shape easily. Okay if you avoid taking things in and out.

reviews.title: Gets the job done
reviews.text: The adhesion is great! The pouch is very stretchy. Too stretchy for me. My hard drive will slip out of tipped toward the opening. Not worth trying to take it off, since I'm just careful to not tip it opening side down. But I wish it was a little more snug.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: Attached easy and no peeling off. Very roomy and accommodating

title: Wireless Bluetooth Mouse for Laptop, Rechargeable Mouse 2.4G USB Optical Wireless Mouse, LED Slim Dual Mode(Bluetooth 5.0 and 2.4G) Wireless Mouse for Laptop, PC, Mac OS, Android, Windows (Seafoam)
features: DUAL MODE (BT 5.0 + 2.4GHz):The dual-mode wireless mouse only needs one switch to realize the free switching of one mouse between two devices. It can connect one device through bluetooth and another device through a 2.4GHz USB receiver.Note: You can't use Bluetooth mode and 2.4G mode at the same time.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN : Good surface coating technology gives you a skin-like touch. The ergonomic design provides 24 hours comfort for your work and study, and the portable and pocket size are perfect for you.Built-in battery,easy to charge by usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.It can be easily activated by clicking any buttons.

AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for 10 minutes, it will go to sleeping mode.
BEST COMPATIBLE BLUETOOTH & RECEIVER: Compatible with more than 99.9% Bluetooth devices. This bluetooth mouse is suitable for all laptops with bluetooth function or ipad iPhone with iOS13 or above.
SERVICE SUPPORT :We provides you with 24-hour email contact service.If you have any mouse questions or needs, please feel free to contact us.

reviews.title: It works! 🤗
reviews.text:
I love the size & the LED feature. It paired perfectly with my iPad so now I can do my work on the go!

I think it’s so clever that it’s a three in one product & it has a little nook to hold the USB plug under the mouse so you don’t have to worry about it getting lost.

Great product with a great price point.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: Junk plastic. Broken.

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text: Love the alternating colors

reviews.title: Great looking and feeling mouse!
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS MOUSE! I got in real and I love the strip of light along the sides. I had to dock a star because the little usb that gets stored on the bottom won’t come out. The little notch isn’t deep enough for my nails or a card to go under. (See photo). Although, I’m still able to use it via Bluetooth and that works great. I have no idea what the DPI button on the top does since the instructions don’t say anything about it. Oh and I’ve been using it for about 2.5 weeks now and I haven’t had to recharge the battery. 👍🏼
